metric_definitions.iou_object_category: For each object category, average object-level actor/part mIoU over test objects in that category, then macro-average category means.
metric_definitions.iou_granularity: Bucket objects by foreground actor count: coarse_1_2_parts, medium_3_4_parts, fine_5plus_parts. Average object-level actor/part mIoU inside each bucket, then macro-average bucket means.
metric_definitions.iou_part: For each object, compute foreground actor IoU values and average them; then average object-level mIoU over the test split.
metric_definitions.cross_view_consistency_acc: Pixel accuracy on the evaluated pixel domain. VG-AlignSeg V4 strict target-only uses per-actor binary accuracy on non-source target views; full-view baselines use multiclass pixel accuracy over all 8 views.

metrics.protocol: task-compatible modification of Cross View Transformers trained on VG-AlignSeg
class-agnostic panoptic segments, Hungarian oracle matched to GT actor ids
per-view foreground RGB+XY proposal clustering, Hungarian matched to actor ids; not native repository result
global cross-view foreground RGB+XY+view clustering, Hungarian matched to actor ids; not native repository result
not directly applicable; BEV map segmentation output
